notes: Hand-traced approximation of Lime Rock Park. Bare track key catches all variants (no_chicane, chicane, etc.). Clockwise: front straight (Sam Posey, bottom) -> Big Bend (T1, sweeping right at east end) -> No Name Straight (top, heading west) -> The Hook (T3, right) -> uphill -> Downhill (T4, left) -> West Bend (T5, right) -> back to S/F. For accurate geometry, run scripts/generate_track_maps.py against the AC content folder; that path overwrites this file (provided --force is passed) with the auto-generated layout from the track's map.png.
